description_long: This is a rectangular, hard-shell suitcase with a muted olive green exterior that shows signs of wear and subtle rust-like speckling, suggesting it is made from metal or a similarly durable material. The suitcase features a single, sturdy top handle made of a brown material, likely leather or reinforced fabric, attached with visible metal hardware. The edges are slightly rounded, and the surface has a matte, weathered finish, giving it a utilitarian, vintage appearance. There are no visible wheels, external pockets, or brand logos on any side. The closure mechanism is not clearly visible, but the seam running around the upper third of the case suggests a hinged or clamshell opening. The overall design is robust and functional, suitable for rugged urban environments or industrial settings.
description: A vintage, olive green hard-shell suitcase with a brown top handle and a weathered, matte finish. No wheels, logos, or external pockets are visible.
description_view_0: Narrow side view showing the brown top handle and the slightly curved, weathered green surface.
description_view_1: Wide front view displaying the full rectangular face, rounded corners, and the top handle arching over the center.
description_view_2: Opposite narrow side view, mirroring view 0 with the same handle and surface details.
description_view_3: Wide rear view, similar to the front, with no visible features except the handle and the aged green surface.
